Class TableSubwindow

java.lang.Object
ui.Subwindow
ui.TableSubwindow
All Implemented Interfaces:
ScrollableWindow
public class TableSubwindow extends Subwindow implements ScrollableWindow
A subwindow that displays and allows editing of tables in a TableRepository. Supports selection, renaming, and deletion of tables via keyboard and mouse.

  • Nested Class Summary

  • Constructor Details

    • TableSubwindow

      public TableSubwindow(int x, int y, int width, int height, String title, TableRepository tableRepository)
      Constructs a new TableSubwindow with the given position, size, and table repository.
      Parameters:
      x - The x-coordinate of the subwindow.
      y - The y-coordinate of the subwindow.
      width - The width of the subwindow.
      height - The height of the subwindow.
      title - The title of the subwindow.
      tableRepository - The table repository to manage.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if title or tableRepository is null.
      IllegalArgumentException - if width or height is non-positive.

    • setSelectedTable

      public void setSelectedTable(int index)
      Selects a table by its index in the list.
      Parameters:
      index - Index to select.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if index is invalid.
